purpose: Reference image for anchoring the Backpack Battles inventory grid to the visible in-game board.
notes: Use the Inventory title as a local anchor, then fit the 9x7 grid below and slightly left of that title.
The visible starting bag cluster is inside this full 9x7 inventory board; do not crop the grid to the cluster.
Cells without bag space should still render as dark board cells, while bag-covered cells show the actual bag sprites.
